home.placeholder: Home screen — add your pages here.

dashboard.heroSubtext: You've completed {{percent}}% of your daily calorie goal.

labelScan.cameraCanceledMessage: The camera was closed before taking a photo.
labelScan.scanPickSubtitle: Take a photo of the label or choose an image from your library.
labelScan.needsConditionsSubtitle: To compare label ingredients with your profile, choose at least one medical condition or food allergy from the catalog.
labelScan.analyzingHint: Reading the label and checking against your profile…
labelScan.serverTextractNotConfigured: Label reading uses AWS Textract on the server. Set AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, and AWS_REGION in backend/.env (not on the phone), then restart the backend / Docker container.

nutritionMeal.addNextMealSubtitle: Track your dinner or snack to complete today's log.
nutritionMeal.step2Subtitle: Name your meal and choose a type. You can refine macros later.
nutritionMeal.insightTitle: Your protein intake is up 12% from last week.
nutritionMeal.insightBody: Based on your activity levels, this increase will better support your muscle recovery. Keep aiming for 140g+ daily through the weekend.
nutritionMeal.cameraPermissionDeniedMessage: Allow camera access in Settings to take meal photos and scan nutrition labels.
nutritionMeal.cameraSimulatorMessage: The camera only works on a real phone. Use a USB-connected iPhone or install the app on your device to try it.
nutritionMeal.mediaLibraryPermissionDeniedMessage: Allow access in Settings so you can choose meal photos and label images from your gallery.
nutritionMeal.pickImageMessage: Take a new photo or choose from your library.
nutritionMeal.mealImageAnalysisFailed: Could not analyze the meal photo. Try again or send a clearer image.
nutritionMeal.mealAddedBody: It’s saved to today’s intake; home charts will update.

onboarding.title: Let's calibrate your clinical profile.
onboarding.subtitle: Precision starts with accurate data. These metrics allow our AI to tailor nutrition and activity protocols specifically for your physiology.
onboarding.conditionsSheetHint: Tap to toggle. You can select multiple.
onboarding.diseasesSheetHint: List matches your app health catalog. Tap to toggle; multiple allowed.
onboarding.allergiesSheetHint: List matches your app allergy catalog. Tap to toggle; multiple allowed.
onboarding.macroPlanSheetHint: Choose one plan. Tap again to clear.
onboarding.dietSheetHint: Tap to toggle. You can select multiple.
onboarding.clinicalCaption: Your data is encrypted and used only for protocol generation.
onboarding.backMessage: You will be signed out and can sign in again later.
onboarding.errorSave: Could not save your profile. Try again.
onboarding.invalidMetrics: Please enter valid height (cm) and weight (kg).
onboarding.requiredFieldsMessage: For disease and diet tracking, you must fill in height, age, weight, and gender.

profile.editHealthSubtitle: Update your height, weight, gender, health conditions, and macro plan. This helps tailor your targets.
profile.supportBody: Access our clinical support team 24/7 for any questions regarding your data.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageSheetHint: Tap a row to switch language.
settings.deleteMessage: Your profile, meals, and preferences will be permanently removed from our servers. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteDisclaimer: Deleting your account is permanent and will remove all health data history and active insights.
settings.deleteSecondMessage: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data.
settings.deleteFailed: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.headline: Choose your path to precision health.
subscription.subhead: Select a plan that aligns with your clinical goals and daily lifestyle.
subscription.footerLegal: Subscriptions automatically renew unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage settings in your Apple ID or Google Play account.

notifications.channelDescription: Meal reminders, insights, and updates from Luminous Health.
notifications.permissionRationale: We use notifications to remind you about meals and share timely health insights.
